//: Mirrors how Vercel's @vercel/node compiles the repo-root /api serverless function: NodeNext module resolution (it forces this for ESM and ignores Bundler). Running `tsc -p tsconfig.json` locally reproduces the Vercel build, so the function + its apps/api & shared imports must be NodeNext-clean (explicit .js extensions). Per-package builds still use their own tsconfig.json (Bundler).
